note: Cursor-format outage #2: the 2026-07-16 run was the pipeline's first-ever clean (unfrozen) run, so it persisted raw runStart with Date.toISOString() milliseconds (17:54:26.862Z) as lastSync - and Congress.gov 400s fractional-seconds fromDateTime just like it 400s bare dates (outage #1, 2026-06-25/07-01). Every nightly 2026-07-17 through 07-22 died on its first backlog request. Repaired to the same instant at seconds precision; sync-bills.mjs now normalizes every persisted cursor and verify-sync.mjs pins the exact format.
